description: Word/syllable-level timing data for a lyrics line

index.description: Zero-based index into the parent line array this cueLine corresponds to

start.description: Start time in milliseconds (may differ from the parent line if cues are more precise)

value.description: Full text of the line (for validation/fallback)

role.description: Semantic role of the cues in this cueLine. Omitted or empty for main vocals. Values: bg (background vocals), voice1 through voiceN (individual voice parts, N is any positive integer with no upper bound), group (group/chorus vocals). When multiple cueLines share the same index, the main vocals cueLine must come first
